description: Pass-row evidence for closed-system offline/install-mode rows, CLI/API direct-differential parity rows, and RPC fake-server fixture parity rows. Every record is closed-system, offline, and backed by an executable test or deterministic artifact check. No live NotebookLM, no browser/keychain/credential access.

evidence_records.promotion_basis: python -B -I -S audit passes with empty violations list under synthetic HOME; verifies no site-packages references
source self-test runs under python -B -I -S with denylisted imports blocked; loaded_denylisted remains empty confirming no forbidden imports
packaged self-test completes with status=passed, live_enabled=false, home_touched=false using bundled RPC/chat fixtures only
singlefile artifact runs under python -B -I -S without site-packages; list --json returns fixture notebook id from embedded payload
built wheel METADATA has no Requires-Dist line; importlib.metadata.requires returns None; zero runtime dependencies verified deterministically
wheel installs to clean venv; notebooklm list --json returns fixture notebook id from packaged data without any live NotebookLM access
pip install --no-deps from source tree installs to clean venv; notebooklm list --json returns fixture notebook id without live access
